arts.ttl: Slot denies Liverpool dropped Darwin Núñez due to row at training ground
arts.sum: Striker left out of squad for win against West Ham Coach confirms Núñez will be back for visit to Leicester Arne Slot has denied Darwin Núñez was dropped from Liverpool’s win against West Ham because of a training-ground row with a member of his coaching staff. The Liverpool head coach said on Sunday that Núñez was absent from the 2-1 victory at Anfield having felt unwell during training the day before, although the striker sat behind the substitutes throughout the game. Speculation has been rife that the Uruguay international, whom Slot criticised for his work rate against Wolves and Aston Villa in February, was left out for disciplinary reasons. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Arne Slot insists Liverpool winning title after losing Jurgen Klopp is 'not a surprise'
arts.sum: Liverpool moved on swiftly after Jurgen Klopp's departure last summer to storm the Premier League in their first season under Arne Slot with their impending title triumph now a formality

arts.ttl: Arne Slot expecting "big summer" for Liverpool after first two deals completed
arts.sum: Liverpool have finally wrapped up contract extensions for key duo Virgil van Dijk and Mohamed Salah and Arne Slot is expected to welcome some new faces once the transfer window reopens

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy gives Leicester City owners warning ahead of crunch talks
arts.sum: Leicester City could find themselves relegated before a ball is even kicked at the King Power Stadium this weekend and there are major question marks over the future of under-fire boss Ruud van Nistelrooy

arts.ttl: Arne Slot responds to rumours of bust-up with Darwin Nunez after Liverpool squad absence
arts.sum: Arne Slot speaks out on rumours of a bust-up with Darwin Nunez after the Liverpool striker was left out of the squad for last week's win over West Ham United

arts.ttl: Liverpool boss Arne Slot REJECTS claims Darwin Nunez was involved in training ground bust-up after under-fire star was dropped for West Ham win
arts.sum: LEWIS STEELE: The Uruguayan sat in the stands and was not named as a sub for the win over West Ham after gossip circulated that he had been involved in a heated scenario at training.

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk's record-breaking Liverpool salary revealed
arts.sum: Liverpool finally confirmed Virgil van Dijk's new contract just a week after committing Mohamed Salah to fresh terms.

arts.ttl: Leicester vs. Liverpool: Mohamed Salah's record against the Foxes
arts.sum: Ahead of Liverpool's Premier League clash with Leicester City, Sports Mole takes a look at Mohamed Salah's record against the Foxes.

arts.ttl: Peter Schmeichel Named Liverpool Icon As Toughest Ever Opponent
arts.sum: It's not often you see anyone associated with United praising a Liverpool star, but Schmeichel had no doubt about Robbie Fowler being the best

arts.ttl: Liverpool icon Xabi Alonso shows true colours with next Real Madrid manager comments
arts.sum: Anfield hero Xabi Alonso finds himself linked with the Real Madrid manager's job, just as he was with Liverpool's this time last year
